entry.title: Corn Kidz 64 v0.0.7
entry.content:
- Nothing, just bumped world version to match mod
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Cyb3RGER/cornkidz64_apworld/compare/v0.0.6...v0.0.7

entry.title: HyperRogue v0.1.0
entry.content:
## Initial Release! Randomizer is fully playable but still lacks a lot of documentation. Hopefully soon to follow.
### Setup for Windows 1. Install [MSYS2](https://www.msys2.org/). Launch MSYS2 UCRT64 and paste the following command: pacman -S mingw-w64-ucrt-x86_64-gcc mingw-w64-ucrt-x86_64-SDL mingw-w64-ucrt-x86_64-SDL_mixer mingw-w64-ucrt-x86_64-SDL_ttf mingw-w64-ucrt-x86_64-SDL_gfx mingw-w64-ucrt-x86_64-glew
2. Download the .zip file from below and extract it.
3. In the extracted folder, open apsettings.json and enter your ip and slotname.
4. Navigate MSYS2 UCRT64 to the extracted folder by running: cd /Path/to/Your/Folder
5. Run: ./hyperrogue.exe
6. Enjoy!
### Setup for Linux with apt-get 1. Run: sudo apt-get install make g++ libsdl1.2-dev libsdl-ttf2.0-dev libsdl-gfx1.2-dev libsdl-mixer1.2-dev libglew-dev libpng-dev zlib1g-dev
2. Download the .zip file from below and extract it.
3. In the extracted folder, open apsettings.json and enter your ip and slotname.
4. In the extracted folder, run ./hyperrogue.
5. Enjoy!

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.5
entry.content:
## Bugfixes
- A second Sleigh Room Key snuck in with a wink and a whirl, now fixed in the multiworld, just one key to twirl!

entry.title: HITMAN World of Assasination v0.8.0
entry.content: - Added support for HITMAN (2016) and HITMAN 2 (2018) - Added new items from Game version v.3.260.0 and the Patient Zero Requiem Pack DLC - Added Full Logic for all complications - "No Disguise" and "One Disguise Change": Removes all Disguisesanity-locations for this specific level - "No Pacifications", "One Pacification" and "No Non-Target Civilian Kills or Pacifications": Removes all Disguisesanity locations that are not lieing on the ground and all Itemsanity locations that are carried by NPCs - "No Agility": All Dubai checks require a starting Location and Chongqing Completion with vanilla targets need a Starting Location that skips the datacore - Added VR support - Added Sniper Assassin checks - Logically Sniper Assassin checks require "Any Sniper + Any Suitcase" or "Any Sniper + Any Agency Pickup", except on Dubai where the former needs "Starting Location - Dubai - Atrium" too - Sniper Assassin cannot be added to Carpathian Mountains - Added the option to add Heavy Snipers into the itempool - These are the Snipers used by 47, Knight and Stone in the Sniper Assassin game mode - They come with their usual amount of Body-Piercing Ammo, Wall-Piercing Ammo and Shockwave Ammo (cycled by pressing [X]) - Added Prioritized Filler Option - Listed Items will be guaranteed to be included in the seed - Added option to disable annoying locations - This is split into the following sub-options: "skip_locations_with_wait_time", "skip_locations_with_extra_step", "skip_locations_carried_by_npcs, "skip_locations_requiring_other_items", "skip_buried_locations" - A full list of which checks fall under which category can be found in the [FAQ](https://github.com/BenDipp/Archipelago/blob/hitman_woa/worlds/hitman_woa/docs/en_hitman_woa.md) - Add options to remove all checks from the goal level or mark them as excluded - Added option to limit the amount of sanity-checks per level - When enabled, a random subset of all available Itemsanity and Disguisesanity checks on each level will chosen - When used with non-split Itemsanity, making sure all Levels remain under the threshold takes priorty over filling the threshold, so you might end up with less items than expected - Added ingame debug options to disable all complications and the forced difficulty selection. - They can be found in the main menu under: Options -> Peacock -> Archipelago - Deprecated PopTracker pack in favour of [Universal Tracker](https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/releases?q=Tracker) - If you have Universal Tracker installed, a tab with a map-tracker will automatically be added to the HITMAN-Client - Note that when using the Universal Tracker Client, some Itemsanity-locatiins can be checked off prematurely on the map. Please use the Tracker Page or switch to the HITMAN Client in that case. - Fixed targets that are missing on master difficulty being chosen as random targets. - Fixed Arthur Edwards not getting a Target Check with Random Targets enabled - Reduced the chance of the Goal Level beeing in an early sphere when playing with level_completion goal mode - Changed minimum number of Complications to 0 - Improved Fuzzer score (7 Failures in 10000 Runs) and seeds are now actually deterministic - Fixed Itempackages having no icons in the loadout screen - Fixed two-handed MEDIUM-items appearing in Itempackages with SMALL-item - You should no-longer spawn with illegal-items in your hand if you have Itempackages equipped - Fixed swapping slots without restarting peacock would cause checks to be uncompletable - Added get_filler_item_name - Fixed various typos

entry.title: Mega Man Zero 3 v0.2.3
entry.content:
Fixed some issues regarding ASyncs and other bugs.
# Bug Fixes - Game now keeps track of previously sent items using RAM. Should help with async games. - No longer checks any state when in Title Screen. - Various backend improvements. - Fixed a missing secret disk location. - Fixed NG+ bug in Sunken Library.

entry.title: Ape Escape v0.9.7
entry.content:
## Version 0.9.7 - New Locations and some fixes! Please read the setup guides for information on how to setup this game for Archipelago : [English](https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/blob/apeescape/worlds/apeescape/docs/setup_en.md) / [French](https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/blob/apeescape/worlds/apeescape/docs/setup_fr.md)
## Changelog
* **Client and logic fixes** - Fixed loading a main menu savestate breaking the client - Fixed MM bug that collected some monkeys wrongly when changing rooms - Fixed WSW Gong Room not allowing traversal when RandomStartingRoom is on - Removed PPM entry Specter Coin indicator on Level Select, it caused some issues - Fixed goal not sending sometimes
* **Options** - [New] Jackets : Choose if static jackets should act as locations - [New] Training Rooms : Choose if locations inside training rooms should be included as checks (Completion or Mailboxes)
* **Changes** - FastTokenWarp is now moved to the LevelSelect. On token related goals and when having collected enough tokens, press and hold start for about a second to instantly warp to your goal, skipping the other requirements. (Now with correct music !)
## Known bugs * Stadium Attack and Gladiator Attack will sometime play the "entering level" music instead of their intended track.
**\*Don't forget to do "Generate Template Options" after installing the ``apworld`` if you want the new options in the YAML\***
Tracker for this apworld version : [Ape Escape Tracker 0.6.2](https://github.com/lurch9229/Ape-Escape-Tracker/releases/tag/0.6.2)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/compare/v0.9.6....v0.9.7

entry.title: HyperRogue v0.1.1
entry.content:
### New Option: #### Logic difficulty: Normal: Obtaining 25 or 50 treasures in a land is only logically required when the orb of the land is already unlocked. Hard: Obtaining 25 or 50 treasures in a land is in logic once the land is unlocked.
### Further changes Some bugfixes...

entry.title: Okami HD v0.4.2
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Entrances rework by @Ragmoa in https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/pull/57 * Fix Cherry Bomb logic * Move Hayabusa to regular Kamiki
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.4.1...0.4.2

entry.title: Dragon Quest IX v0.1.1
entry.content:
# Dragon Quest IX - Beta Release (Version 0.1.1)
**This is a beta release. Things can possibly break, though the core gameplay should run normally.**
New to the game? Check out the [FAQ](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1427594624389742716/1491731616068800543) ## Bugs fixed
* Removed some non-existing locations * Updated / corrected special location rules * Fixed logic bug causing Morag to not be in-logic, leading to unbeatable seeds
## Added or Updated Features
* Added more test, to catch logic and coding errors * Boss Keys for non-relevant bosses do not appear in the item pool anymore

entry.title: Total War Warhammer 3 v0.9.6.post2
entry.content:
Requires Archipelago 0.6.7+
Changeling is currently missing it's buildings and techs (do not enable sanity on changeling). Changeling may not work on Spheres. Altered logic for spheres mode to reduce softlocking with sanity/ritualsanity enabled. Fixed battlesanity generation error in conquest.
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/README.md). [FAQ](https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/blob/main/FAQ.md).
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jordansds/Archipelago_TWW3_Alt/compare/v0.9.5...v0.9.6

entry.title: Mega Man X v1.6.2
entry.content: mega man x broke # Info * [General info](https://thelx5.github.io/mmx/index.html) * [Setup](https://thelx5.github.io/mmx/setup.html) * Additional client commands are implemented, use `/help` to see which commands are available # Changes * Fixed a softlock related receiving items that pause the game for a brief moment * Fixed DamageLink handling causing incoming DeathLink signals crash the client * DeathLink signals are now properly ignored if you're not controlling the player

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.3.6
entry.content: broken stuff is no longer broken ## Info * [Download](https://github.com/TheLX5/Archipelago/releases/tag/waffles-v1.3.6) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.3.6) * Requires a new seed to be generated ## Changes * Fixed a crash related to DamageLink and Yoshi * Fixed Yoshi ignoring extra hearts when receiving DamageLink signals * Fixed DamageLink handling causing incoming DeathLink and TrapLink signals crash the client * DeathLink signals are now ignored if you're not controlling the player

entry.title: Refunct v1.1.0
entry.content:
# Version 1.1.0 - _the biology update_ ## New YAML options - Added the Climb Narrow minigame (off by default). - Added the Rando Mountain minigame (off by default because you need the E key to dash (hint: you can use Steam to remap controls)). It's the Refunct Mountain minigame but with buttons in a random order. You also only have jump and **dash**, nothing else! (Except you can temporarily swim to get the underwater button). - Added the possibility to replace all flowers by traps. - 🌹 Someone asked: you can now rename Grass and Flowers to more than 30 actual grasses and flowers, like `Little bluestem` and `Chrysanthemum`. 🌷 You can even go for Latin names like `Hydrangea macrophylla` and `Schizachyrium scoparium` 💮 ## Fixes - Fixed small issue where jumping on jump pads would grassify a platform but wouldn't send a check in main rando and seeker minigame.
(Readme and instructions: https://github.com/spinerak/refunct-tas-archipelago/blob/master/README.md)

entry.title: HITMAN World of Assasination v0.8.1
entry.content: - Fixed generation error when max_sanity_checks_per_level is set to 0 - Fixed Peacock always using vanilla contracts, even when random targets is enabled

entry.title: Hi-Fi RUSH v0.2.3.post2
entry.content:
See [README](https://github.com/TRPG0/HbkArchipelago/blob/main/README.md) for install instructions.
Packaged with `zDEV-UE4SS_v3.0.1-947-g06474186`, `hibiki-bootstrap-v0.2.0`
- Fixed completed levels sometimes not saving properly. - Added a backup save system in case of corrupted save data due to crashes.

entry.title: YARG v0.0.16
entry.content:
# Use Client Version 0.0.5+. No Client Update Required!
New: - Support for the YARN Pack 4 Setlist
## What's Changed * YARN Pack 4 by @energymaster22 in https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/pull/35
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/energymaster22/YARGArchipelago/compare/0.0.15...0.0.16

entry.title: Shadow The Hedgehog v0.4.4
entry.content:
**Item Box Sanity** Capsules, boxes containing capsules are added as optional sanity.
**Checkpoint Shuffle** Random starting checkpoint for levels and unlockable checkpoints as items in game.
**Checkpoint Convenience** Option available to be able to go back to any previous activated checkpoint when playing with checkpoint sanity on.
**Improved Logic Handling** Reworked logic for all enemies, items, weapons, etc to improve seeds.
**Key Shuffle** Options related to key items and key doors allowing for more varied routes through stages.
**Last Way Early** Previous Last Way was only included in story shuffle with the option, but now available by selecting Last Story even when playing select, preventing Devil Doom.
**Select Gates** Gates added so stage accessibility is not locked to single stage unlocks.
**Traps** Small assortment of traps added - Checkpoint, Ammo and Poison.

entry.title: Phantasy Star II v0.1.1
entry.content: Some bugfixes and a small new feature: - Receiving lots of items at once should no longer make the items at the back of the queue disappear forever. - Climatrol should no longer have progression items in its chests, because you can't re-enter once you beat Neifirst. - `start_inventory_from_pool` option now supported.

entry.title: Parkitect v1.3.4
entry.content:
Installation can be found [here](https://github.com/CrusherRL/AP_Parkitect?tab=readme-ov-file#-installation)
Enjoy!
NOTE: This release is not backwards compatible with seeds generated **before **1.2.1 AP World is unchanged! (1.3.3)
# Parkitect Archipelago — Release Notes ## Fix - Fixed supported version output. (was non readable) - Fixed broken Readme pieces
# QOL Added AP Settings to options/mods. It Also displays the Version, the supported AP World version and the config path.
# QOL for Dev :D Park Data now format in json.

entry.title: Okami HD v0.4.3
entry.content:
# Okami HD ApWorld 0.4.3
- Remove starting Power slash - Simplify CoN Logic **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Ragmoa/Archipelago/compare/0.4.2...0.4.3

entry.title: Refunct v1.1.1
entry.content:
A bunch of small fixes. - You can use this mod for worlds generated with 1.1.0. - You can use the same yaml (though it won't show changes 2 and 3).
## Changes: 1. (mod) Fixed seeker minigame: in-game progress tracker is now correct again. 2. (apworld) Incremented maximum number of minigames to 11. 3. (apworld) Added the option to have both English and Latin names of grass/flowers in the pool 💮

entry.title: Grim Dawn v0.4.0
entry.content:
### What's New: * Option to block flooded passage exit, requiring wightmire bridge to proceed * QoL notifications onscreen for when you receive a progression item * 1 new Trap: literature * Devotion shrines previously exclusive to elite or ultimate difficulty are now in normal and also are locations * Option to force devotion shrine offerings to always be aether crystals * Option "Ultra Rapid Fire" to make mana costs and cooldowns 85% less, affects both players and enemies * Option to make pets live forever * Option to change quality of generic gear loot * Option to change the camera to third person pov ### What's Changed: * Client says to wait for message instead of 30 seconds * Client checks for apworld version and dlc files if dlc is enabled * Included Altener's instructions for Linux in the installation instructions ### Bug Fixes: * Fixed connect on world load script not triggering when playing a female character * Fixed Lancel missing dialog for Korvaak goal * Fixed reinforced shell renamed to serrated shell * Fixed making a deal being in logic without homestead revered * Fixed summoners summoning summoners in enemy rando * Fixed enemy on-death summons causing infinite loop game crash * Fixed enemy rando causing widespread enemy in-fighting
Get the poptracker at https://github.com/routhken/Grim_Dawn_tracker/releases/ Get the mod at https://www.nexusmods.com/grimdawn/mods/167 Installation Instructions at https://github.com/routhken/Archipelago/blob/Grim_Dawn/worlds/grim_dawn/docs/guide_en.md

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16909055
entry.content:
**To see notes and what's new for alpha03, see [alpha03a](https://github.com/JKLeckr/Archipelago-cuphead/releases/tag/alpha03a)**
### Revision
This revision fixes the missing cookie requirement in the "Double Jump or Dash" logic rule that some locations use.

entry.title: Cuphead v0.2.16909311
entry.content:
**To see notes and what's new for alpha03, see [alpha03a](https://github.com/JKLeckr/Archipelago-cuphead/releases/tag/alpha03a)**
### Revision
This revision updates the built in docs.

entry.title: HyperRogue v0.1.2
entry.content:
## What's new?
#### Orb of Foresight (Hint Orb) There is now an option for Orbs of Foresight. They spawn in lands you have not yet completed. When collected, an Orb of Foresight grants a hint for the next location check in its land.
#### Generation Fix Turns out it was not possible to include two instances of Hyperrogue in your Rando previously. This is now fixed.
Furthermore, the Unlock Check for Ruined City was always considered in Logic. Oops.
Linux build following soon.

entry.title: HyperRogue v0.1.3
entry.content:
Updated the games' rules to use rule builder instead of lambda expressions, allegedly making generation run way faster.
Linux build soon to follow.

entry.title: Buckshot Roulette v0.4.1
entry.content:
**Hotfix 1 (5/12/2026):** Fixed another crash which would occur when attempting to draw a hand saw under specific circumstances.
## Features - **Consumable Item Randomization** - Item unlocks are shuffled randomly - **Steam Achievements** - Obtain items from completing achievements - **Shotsanity** - Obtain items from successful shots - **Streaksanity** - Obtain items from successful shots on the dealer in a row without being shot yourself - **Customizable Goal** - Choose from one of the following goals: - **70K**: Beat the game - **140K**: Beat 6 Double or Nothing rounds in a row - **1000K**: Cash out in Double or Nothing mode with a score of at least 1 million - **Custom**: Cash out in Double or Nothing mode with a user-specified minimum score - **Customizable Item Logic** - Customize how many consumable items are expected to beat a certain number of rounds - **Custom Mechanics** - Unique gameplay features specific to the Archipelago world - **Hint Mode** - Complete rounds and achievements to get hints for locations in other slots in an Archipelago game ## Changelog ### World - Modified generation of point increase items to be slightly more generous (more likely to have higher point increases) ### Client - Fixed fatal crash which could occur when drawing an item ## Guides - [Info](<https://github.com/asdfwyay/APBuckshot/blob/dev/worlds/buckshot/docs/en_Buckshot Roulette.md>) - [Setup & Updating](https://github.com/asdfwyay/APBuckshot/blob/dev/worlds/buckshot/docs/setup_en.md)

entry.title: Mario Kart Wii v0.2.1
entry.content:
## Release Version 0.2.1: Bug fixes and tracker improvements Just a small release fixing a bunch of small issues people have experienced. Thank you all for reporting them in the [Discord](https://discord.gg/archipelago).
### Changelog: - Added individual track locking visual to tracker. - Fixed connection issues when trying to connect new client with old seed. - Fixed complete goal on connection issue. - Fixed receiving item during roulette bug. - Fixed program not closing when saying continue? no. in license select prompt. - Fixed golden mushroom timer issue. - Fixed oversight in item distribution to now use the standing when grabbing the box, rather than the standing at the end of roulette.
**REQUIRES VERSION 0.2.0 (or 0.2.1, they are the same) APWORLD**
_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.2.0...v0.2.1

entry.title: Banjo Tooie v4.11.6
entry.content: # 4.11.6 - This is update featuring changes based on Mysteryem's comments on the PR into core. Thanks Mysteryem! - Generations are now 2-5% faster, since rules no longer check for the Universal Tracker Glitched Logic Item during a normal generation. - There is now an option validation for skip puzzles if you accidentally selected to play with randomize_worlds. - Fixed a bug with the yaml validation where it let you have bass clefs or extra treble clefs without randomizing notes. - Added some missing indirect conditions, which should patch some strange bugs with the logic evaluation. - There is now a check to make a generation fail early, if you end up with an unbeatable seed. - Cryptic hint generation has been optimized for large multiworlds with a lot of cryptic hints, by a factor of 2.

entry.title: Anodyne v0.6.2
entry.content: - Fixed logic errors in Debug when accessed without broom

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.5.5
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.5.5
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: K-On! After School Live!! v1.1.4
entry.content:
- Fixes a bug where the game could freeze when unexpected story events were triggered. This could only happen if you continued playing after already achieving your goal. - Fixes a bug where placing items into your start inventory could result in generation failures.
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/k-on_archipelago/blob/main/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v79
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.3): - "alternates" for logic - other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off - integrate always on level

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.99
entry.content:
Only Chapter 1 / 2 / 3 are available for now, use v1.2.1 if you want to play chapter 4!
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**>>> This is an unstable pre-release. Unless you're testing, we recommend using version v1.2.1 instead. <<<**
Known issue: - Unlock Character option have currently broken logic et may require to send a character is you're stuck - Level up actually make locked character unlock by increasing their max hp above 0

entry.title: Mega Man Zero 3 v0.2.4
entry.content:
Minor bugfixes. I forgot about this one last patch.
# Bug Fixes - You are now unable to leave the final level prematurely, as currently it will take you to the credits unexpectedly. This will be properly fixed later.
# Backend Stuff - The rom.py file has been rewritten using a Ghidra script to better show the ASM changes that make up the file.

entry.title: ULTRAKILL v3.5.2
entry.content: - Added a counter for enemies killed in each level, with a full list when hovering over the counter. - Added enemies killed to the act summary. - Added recent locations and items to the act select menu. - Fixed Core Eject and Pump Charge secondary fire being usable while locked. - Fixed incorrect logic for 4-1: Secret 4.

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.6
entry.content:
## Changes - Tracker bugs with `.value` were fixed up just right, now UT glides smoothly by morning and night! - Tiny log changes had tiny adjustments, `excluded_environments` got a name-line replacement.
## Bugfixes - The docs grew clearer with wording brand-new, so randomizer changes are easier to view!

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.99
entry.content:
Only Chapter 1 / 2 / 3 are available for now, use v1.2.1 if you want to play chapter 4!
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**>>> This is an unstable pre-release. Unless you're testing, we recommend using version v1.2.1 instead. <<<**

entry.title: Deep Rock Galactic v0.18.4
entry.content:
**Changes (Compatible with previous 0.18 Versions)**
- Fixed odd behaviour when selecting a specific class and random weapons - Added handler to avoid crashing when multiworld contained over 75 worlds - Added toggle command to turn off sending messages to game - Forced file typing to hopefully solve Linux compatibility issues
**INFO FILES** [INSTRUCTIONS](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16At-2kS_azJRf9PdUcZeA8Esfoh6kNm2dWVWy8u8wA0/edit?usp=sharing) [MOD on MOD.IO](https://mod.io/g/drg/m/test-archipelago-integration#description) [SIDELOADER for DRG Mods](https://github.com/trumank/mint)

entry.title: Lego Star Wars: The Complete Saga v1.4.2
entry.content:
This release is fully compatible with seeds generated by earlier 1.4.x versions.
# Known issues - When Universal Tracker is installed, `/next_progression` does not work for Lego Star Wars: TCS (affects all 1.4.x versions).
# New - An option has been added to automatically collect spawned pickups (studs and hearts), like in 1-4, 3-1 and LEGO City in vanilla. This can be set to apply to all levels, or just vehicle levels, and can be adjusted at any time through the `/auto_collect_pickups` command in the client (even on older seeds where this option did not exist). - The Free Play Selection has been modified to additionally always try to pick characters that: - Have jetpacks - Can use Astromech Panels (this fixes the game not picking IG-88/4-LOM when they are your only characters that can use Astromech Panels) - Can High Jump + Slam - Can Zap droids - Are a Force Ghost - Are Yoda/Yoda (Ghost) - Is Droideka - An option has been added to control the chance that Trap items in the shop show as fake Progression items, previously, this was always 50%.
# Fixes - Fix a backwards compatibility crash with 1.3.x seeds when chapters are locked by needing characters, when the client is run with assertions enabled. - Added extra safeguards to prevent random client errors from trying to force open Cantina doors before the doors have even loaded in.
# Changes - PyMem-related errors are now logged directly into the client feed, instead of only the log file, to try to help track down issues causing the in-game messages to stop displaying. - Internally, all game addresses have switched over to GOG addresses, with the GOG addresses being automatically converted to Steam addresses when playing the Steam version of Lego Star Wars: TCS. Previously, this was around the other way. If you notice any weird behaviour, such as checks not sending or checks sending early, please try with the 1.4.1 client too, and include whether the 1.4.1 client fixed the issue when reporting the bug with the 1.4.2 client.

entry.title: Brotato v0.15.0
entry.content:
## Added
- Added Wounded character from All Pain No Gain update (Brotato 1.1.15.0).

entry.title: Ape Escape v0.9.8
entry.content:
## Version 0.9.8 - New options and fixes! Please read the setup guides for information on how to setup this game for Archipelago : [English](https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/blob/apeescape/worlds/apeescape/docs/setup_en.md) / [French](https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/blob/apeescape/worlds/apeescape/docs/setup_fr.md)
* **Client and logic fixes** - Added two missing jacket checks in Monkey Madness. - Adjusted a few jacket location name disambiguations for better clarity. - Fixed bug with Expert Specter's Factory not having logic for returning to start. - Added Water Net as access to Frosty Retreat Gash. - Added Flyer as requirement for normal difficulty to traverse Monkey Madness Outside Castle to Crater. - Updated Time Station info mailbox to include information on recently added settings. - Updated options documentation to reflect recent changes. * **Options** - Implemented Entrance Plando and reworked the "entrance" option. The new options are: - Recommended: New option that chooses another option based on your goal. - Level Shuffle: Same behavior as "on" for the prior version. - Era Shuffle: New option that keeps the three levels in an era together. - Lock Endgame: Similar behavior to "lockmm" for the prior version: guarantees the final two entrances are Monkey Madness and Peak Point Matrix. - Lock PPM: Guarantees the final entrance is Peak Point Matrix. - Goal Level First: Places your goal level at Fossil Field. - Custom: Gives the ability to force any level to be at any entrance! - Note that for "mm", "ppm" and "ppmtoken" goals, Peak Point Matrix will always be forced to be last, even overriding custom placements. For "mm", this is because Peak Point Matrix was considered postgame is not a location, while for the other two, unlocking the entrance is the go mode condition. - Implemented Option groups to help YAML clarity
## Known bugs * Stadium Attack and Gladiator Attack will sometime play the "entering level" music instead of their intended track.
**\*Don't forget to do "Generate Template Options" after installing the ``apworld`` if you want the new options in the YAML\***
Tracker for this apworld version : [Ape Escape Tracker 0.6.2](https://github.com/lurch9229/Ape-Escape-Tracker/releases/tag/0.6.2)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Thedragon005/Archipelago-Ape-Escape/compare/v0.9.7....v0.9.8

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v80
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.3): - "alternates" for logic - other changes to logic: locations are removed if any required region is excluded, levels detected differently, gear licenses not required if the setting is off - integrate always on level - The Pre-Sequel initial integration

entry.title: Ty the Tasmanian Tiger v1.4.2
entry.content: For the client plugin and changelog, see [Ty1 AP Client](https://github.com/xMcacutt-Archipelago/Ty1AP-Client)

entry.title: Library of Ruina v1.0.0
entry.content:
As always, check known bugs and report bugs in #70
**New run required**
**Uses -gamma .apworld**
## What changed since -alpha: ### In -beta: - FIXED: Custom books are now properly saved - FIXED: Now you can't put books into the invitation manually, and can't find receptions earlier that way - FIXED: Impossible Passive Attribution Points (Needs testing, but i'm 99% sure it's fixed now) - FIXED: Receptions are no longer visible after joining new session without closing the game - FIXED: It's not possible to open Black Silence and Distorted Ensemble before you reach those battles ### In -gamma: - CHANGED: Updated reception tree looks in the game. the reception box of doom. It's only for testing, so bear with me. - CHANGED & FIXED: Changed how run seeds work. Fixed stuff related to them (also thanks Yar)

entry.title: Refunct v1.1.1a0
entry.content:
## Mod only update. The apworld and yaml are the same as 1.1.1.
## Fixes - Refunct Mountain works again (it was bugged and started with all platforms up) - Removed a debugging message

entry.title: Lego Star Wars: The Complete Saga v1.4.3
entry.content:
This release is fully compatible with seeds generated by earlier 1.4.x versions.
# Fixes - Fix Universal Tracker's `/next_progression` client command. It will only show characters guaranteed to exist in your seed, and if any character with a specific ability would unlock more locations, then the Item Group for that ability is shown. - Fix IG-88 and 4-LOM not being picked by the game to fulfil the role of Protocol Droids.

entry.title: Deltarune v1.2.99
entry.content:
(This APWorld is intended for DELTARUNE 1.04. Using a Beta or the Ch1+2 Demo will not work.)
**>>> This is an unstable pre-release. Unless you're testing, we recommend using version v1.2.1 instead. <<<**
